meta.title: AntiGravity
meta.subtitle: A living portfolio of prototypes, platforms, and experiments
meta.author: Justin Massion

statuses.code-only: Source code — not embeddable in browser

projects.name: AgentWorld OS
projects.description: A dockable-panel operating environment for AI agents: FlexLayout window management, 3D solar-system visualizations of the OS file structure, mission control, device profiles, and a tag-based folder system. The most ambitious platform prototype in the collection.
highlights: Dockable, draggable panel system built on FlexLayout
3D solar-system view of the OS Solar System data backbone
Mermaid diagrams, mission control, and device profiles
explore: Drag panel tabs to split and dock windows — the whole workspace is rearrangeable
Open the 3D views (solar system / node map) from the left icon rail
Check Mission Control, Daily Routine, and Agent Data Shards panels
Relational CMS and Virtual File System panels show the data backbone

projects.name: OS Solar System
projects.description: A file-explorer UI over a cross-platform OS folder structure — device profiles, preferences, and control panels expressed as JSON. Acts as the data backbone that AgentWorld renders in 3D.
explore: Browse Operating Systems → each OS folder mirrors the same structure
Open Devices and Control Panel to see per-device JSON profiles
This exact data is what AgentWorld renders as a 3D solar system

projects.name: oneOS
projects.tagline: One world. Every device. Infinite resolution.
projects.description: A universal OS experience layer built from first principles: one language to replace HTML/CSS/JS, one state model synced across devices, one rendering pipeline scaling from watches to VR. The generative vision page is the product — plus a full PRD, phased plan, and methodology wiki.
explore: Scroll the vision page — the product IS the homepage
Deeper docs (PRD, phases, methodology) live in the source folder, not the page

projects.name: Mission Control Center
projects.description: A full zero-dependency CMS platform: chat system, people and teams, feedback boards, file manager, credit tracking, and a marketing site — all vanilla JS modules with localStorage persistence, bundled by Vite.
explore: Use the sidebar: Chat, People & Teams, Feedback, File Manager, Docs are all real views
Create/edit content — everything persists in your browser (localStorage)
Watch the credit tracker respond as you work
Agent avatars in chat are themed personas (Architect, Forge, Sentinel…)

projects.name: AntiGravity Engine
projects.tagline: The imagination engine — wish worlds into existence
projects.description: A modular spatial-computing engine concept with World, Senses, SpaceML, Foundation, and Life systems. Ships with a landing page and its own wiki documenting the engine architecture.
explore: Read the landing page manifesto
The engine wiki (wiki/ under this project) documents World, Senses, SpaceML, Foundation, and Life systems

projects.name: TabSpace — WebBrowser
projects.description: Multiplayer browser concept with CDP streaming, a 3D sphere tab view, 8 view modes, and agent orchestration. The static site presents the vision; the full build drives Chrome via Playwright and WebSockets.
explore: Scroll the vision site for TabSpace — 8 view modes, CDP streaming, multiplayer browsing
The mockups show the 3D sphere tab view; the real CDP driver lives in source only

projects.name: Void Room
projects.tagline: Shared shape sandbox in the dark — rebuilt 2026
projects.description: v2 rebuild on the Spatial Lab engine: place, drag, rotate, recolor, and scale primitives in an infinite dark grid. State persists, and other open tabs mirror every change live over BroadcastChannel — the original's collaborative soul, kept. Original combined edition and 26-device guide preserved as variants.
explore: Click the ground to place shapes; keys 1–9 switch shape type
Drag to move · R rotate · C recolor · +/- resize · X delete
Open this page in a second tab — every change syncs live between tabs
Detail view links the original combined edition and the 26-device setup guide

projects.name: AG Orchestrator
projects.description: A Next.js + React Three Fiber visualization of an AI agent pipeline: work travels a 3D rail through Genesis, Processing, and Delivery stations, with station task lists, live agent diagnostics, and a voice-command bar. Playable static export (Clerk auth and server logging stripped; full source in the original BrowserPlatformer folder).
explore: Watch work orbs travel the rail through Genesis → Processing → Delivery
Read station task lists and the live Agent Diagnostics panel
The voice-command bar needs mic permission; Clerk login was removed for this static build

projects.name: NoahOS Wiki
projects.description: An advanced modular OS interface, AI workspace, and the AntiGravity documentation wiki (HolodeckOS docs). One of the earliest and most complete case studies.
explore: Navigate the sidebar wiki — it is a full modular OS interface
Open the HolodeckOS docs subsite bundled inside (antigravity-docs-noah)
One of the earliest artifacts: the doc system the whole project grew from

projects.name: Garfield: Coming Home
projects.tagline: Every day is Monday (when you're home)
projects.description: A cinematic static site for Project Garfield — narrative scroll design and architecture pages.
explore: Scroll the cinematic narrative page top to bottom — it is a single set piece

projects.name: Aluzina Explorer
projects.tagline: Design explorer with LovArt scraper API
projects.description: A standalone design-explorer UI integrating the LovArt Scraper API, backed by ~360MB of curated imagery. Its Vercel deployment redirects to a lapsed holodeckos.com domain (expired TLS), so it is offline until the domain is detached — source and media remain in the original folder.
explore: Offline: needs its Express API + ~360MB of imagery. Ask to revive it via the snapshot technique used for LovArt Explorer

projects.name: AlphaUnicorn.io
projects.tagline: Developing unicorns — premium brand site rebuild
projects.description: A premium dark-mode single-page rebuild of the AlphaUnicorn.io brand site — the VirtuOS product story, venture portfolio, scroll animations, and marquee ticker.
explore: Scroll for the animations — marquee ticker, reveal effects
Venture portfolio and VirtuOS product sections
A few images hotlinked from the old WordPress site are gone (their origin 404s)

projects.name: Air.inc Rebuild
projects.description: A pixel-faithful recreation of air.inc — 3D glassy logo animation, a four-state theme system, scroll animations, and a content.config.js enabling one-click brand swaps.
explore: Watch the 3D glassy logo animation on load
Try the theme switcher — four complete visual states
content.config.js in source enables one-click brand swaps of the whole site

projects.name: Media Engine
projects.description: Marketing site for an AI content factory — 3D characters, pricing, and competitive positioning. Self-hosted here with its hero imagery transcoded from 59MB of PNGs to lightweight JPEGs.
explore: Scroll the full marketing narrative — chaos → assembly line → brand DNA
The hero imagery was AI-generated (the 'brain images')
Pricing and competitive positioning sections at the bottom

projects.name: FranchiseOS
projects.tagline: One template system, six franchise sites
projects.description: A hub-and-spokes template system for spinning up franchise sites fast. The hub links six implementations: CoPlay, Skool, Petrock Hotel, Barry's Tickets, CoHost Company, and KittyBird Blooms.
explore: The hub links six complete franchise sites built from one template system
Open 2–3 variants (CoPlay, Petrock Hotel, KittyBird Blooms) to compare the reskins

projects.name: SwipeRate
projects.description: An XY/XYZ spatial rating engine with swipe gestures, a drag engine, and multi-user annotation support. Landing page plus the full rating app.
explore: Read the landing page, then launch the Rating App variant
Drag items on the XY plane — position IS the rating
Try XYZ mode for three-axis rating and the multi-user annotation support

projects.name: Agent Manager Dashboard
projects.description: A dashboard tracking AI agent conversations, workspace statuses, and project threads across the whole AntiGravity effort.
explore: Browse the tracked agent conversations and workspace statuses
Cards link threads to projects — an early ancestor of this very portfolio

projects.name: Annotation Studio
projects.description: A lightweight review tool for commenting and annotating work in progress.
explore: A lightweight review UI — click around the comment and annotation affordances

projects.name: AG Lessons
projects.tagline: AI agent concepts, stripped of jargon
projects.description: An interactive knowledge dashboard for learning AI agent concepts — visual diagrams, plain language, and progress tracking in localStorage.
explore: Pick any lesson — concepts are explained jargon-free with visual diagrams
Your progress persists between visits (localStorage)

projects.name: Sanity Wiki
projects.tagline: Liquid Glass wiki/CMS with agent orchestration
projects.description: A complete wiki/CMS system: 50+ structured markdown files covering agents, skills, styles, rules, brand, publishing, and CRM — browsed through a Liquid Glass SPA with a backlink system. Also includes a Sanity Studio and Next.js frontend (source only).
explore: Browse sections 00–12: framework, agents, skills, styles, rules, brand, publishing, CRM
Follow [[backlinks]] between pages — it is a real linked wiki
The Liquid Glass UI itself is part of the prototype

projects.name: The Living Canvas
projects.description: A 13-chapter wiki covering an entire system vision — philosophy, interfaces, foundation, agents, connections, orchestration, z-space simulation, 3D quality pipeline, ledger, evolution, build procedure, module catalog, and validation — with diagrams and a master plan.
explore: 13 chapters from Philosophy to Validation — read 00 and 10 for the core vision
Diagrams section visualizes the architecture
MASTER_PLAN ties the whole system together

projects.name: HolodeckOS Gallery (v1)
projects.description: The original AntiGravity dashboard this portfolio replaces: glass-morphism project gallery with grid/list views and a Three.js 3D spatial mode. Kept as a working artifact of the collection's own history.
explore: This is the portfolio's ancestor — try grid and list views
Hit the 3D Mode button for the Three.js spatial view
Project links inside point at old paths and may 404 — it is preserved as an artifact

projects.name: Higgsfield Media Browser
projects.description: A media browser over the Higgsfield asset library — loads 3,184 real assets from CloudFront with video playback, boards, favorites, and detail views. Backed by scraping scripts and a sync pipeline.
explore: 3,184 real assets stream from CloudFront — filter by image/video/audio
Click any video for playback; open the detail view for metadata
Try boards and favorites; search by model type or date

projects.name: LovArt Explorer
projects.description: An art-platform explorer with deep traversal — 174 projects, 211 agent threads, and full chat histories with generated media, snapshotted 2026-07-07 from the live LovArt API and baked into 52MB of static JSON. Media streams from LovArt's CDN; no server or tokens needed.
highlights: 174 projects / 211 threads / full chat + artifact history
Chat histories lazy-load per thread — fast first paint
Captured in-browser: auth token never left Chrome
explore: 174 projects → click one to see its agent threads
Open a thread for the full chat history with every generated artifact inline
Images, videos, and 3D models all render; data is a baked snapshot (2026-07-07)
If media ever breaks, see docs/RUNBOOK-lovart.md in the repo

projects.name: Air UI — Asset Library
projects.description: A from-scratch rebuild of the Air.inc digital-asset-manager UI: infinite scroll, filter rail, metadata panel, and 16,625 assets of LovArt/Higgsfield provenance data. Note: lovart.ai now blocks hotlinked media, so many tiles render as placeholders — the UI, data, and interactions are fully intact.
explore: 16,625 assets with full provenance — use the filter rail (type, source, tool)
Try Exact vs Smart search modes
Switch grid/list/kanban views (top right); open an asset for the metadata panel
Boards tree on the left mirrors the LovArt/Higgsfield source hierarchy

projects.name: LovArt + Higgsfield Air Organizer
projects.description: An organizer that unifies LovArt and Higgsfield scraped assets into Air.inc — upload pipelines and provenance tracking.
explore: A snapshot of the upload/organizer pipeline UI that fed Air.inc

projects.name: Aurora Builder
projects.description: A Lovable-exported canvas exploration — Hyper Weave generative visuals.
explore: A full 'HyperCard' spatial-OS concept site — use the top nav (Workspace, Nodes, Flow 3D…)
Enter the World for the hero experience

projects.name: Cosmic Dreamscape Arts
projects.description: A Lovable-exported art app exploration — cosmic dreamscape visuals.
explore: Lovable-built art app exploration — navigate its pages via the top nav

projects.name: VirtuOS Production Pipeline
projects.description: A Lovable-exported production-pipeline UI for the VirtuOS concept.
explore: VirtuOS production-pipeline concept — explore the pipeline stages

projects.name: Orbit Formations
projects.tagline: The portfolio as a constellation — rebuilt 2026
projects.description: v2 rebuild of the Immersive Gallery on the Spatial Lab engine: every project floats in space and morphs live between ring, helix, wall, and sphere formations — orbit, zoom, and click any panel for project info. Original multi-mode prototype preserved as a variant.
explore: Morph the whole portfolio between ring, helix, wall, and sphere formations
Drag to orbit, click any panel for project info, toggle auto-spin
The original 8-mode prototype is linked as a variant

projects.name: Corridor Gallery
projects.description: v2 rebuild of the Spatial Corridors studies on the shared Spatial Lab engine: a living vaulted corridor where every alcove holds a real project from this portfolio — scroll-momentum travel, god rays, glow pools, fireflies, and click-through to each project. Originals preserved as variants.
highlights: Every alcove displays a live portfolio project with deep links
Momentum scroll travel with parallax look — distilled from Living Gallery v5
Category wings with color-coded glow pools
explore: Scroll to travel the corridor — momentum carries you
Hover art to wake it; click to open that project's info
Category wings change the glow color; three v1 originals linked as variants

projects.name: Motion Lab
projects.description: v2 rebuild of 3D Mouse Mastery on the Spatial Lab engine: one obstacle field, four control schemes to feel the difference — orbit, WASD pointer-lock fly, cinematic rail scrub, and damped chase-cam hunting a comet. Raycast hover feedback throughout. Original v3.15 study preserved as a variant.
explore: Switch between the four camera modes and feel the difference
Fly mode: click to lock pointer, WASD + QE to move, Shift for speed
Rail mode: scroll scrubs a cinematic dolly; Chase hunts the comet

projects.name: Visual Terminal
projects.description: An image-first AI terminal: every response is a generated image with clickable hotspots for visual exploration. Self-hosted; bring your own Gemini API key — it is requested once and stored only in your browser (the previously hardcoded key was removed from the bundle).
explore: Bring a free Gemini API key (aistudio.google.com) — asked once, stored only in your browser
Every response is a generated image; click hotspots inside images to go deeper
Try the vibe-coding demo cards: landing page, game HUD, e-commerce

projects.name: Rive Interactive Showcase
projects.description: Rive-native interactive demos — an agent mission-control dashboard and an animated button system built entirely in Rive with programmatic state-machine control.
explore: All animation is Rive state machines — click the buttons and watch transitions
The agent mission-control dashboard is driven programmatically

projects.name: Nexus Dashboard v4
projects.description: A next-generation dashboard layout prototype — multi-panel design system with handoff rules and design tokens.
explore: A static multi-panel layout study; the Handoff Rules variant documents the design tokens

projects.name: Unreal AI Cloud Control
projects.description: An Express dashboard for controlling cloud infrastructure — AWS Cost Explorer and EC2 via the AWS SDK, with Clerk auth and a memory vault. The UI is embedded here; live AWS data requires running the server with credentials.
explore: UI renders fully; live AWS cost/EC2 data needs the server running with credentials

projects.name: AI Autopilot — Stream Deck
projects.description: A Stream Deck plugin with context detection, an AI Style Lab, device shop, and Stripe billing — plus the marketing site embedded here.
explore: Marketing site for the Stream Deck plugin — Style Lab, device shop, billing sections
The actual plugin source (TypeScript, Rollup) lives in the original folder

projects.name: The Play Set — Favorites
projects.tagline: 101 curated renders, sequenced as a build
projects.description: A curated visual gallery of AI-generated concept art for 'The Play Set' company system — hand-picked by Aleja from every image the generators produced. Sequenced as five chapters: raw building-block components, template studies, the full company system, internal pipeline maps, and the Westcol client work.
projects.source: AntiGravity Rebuild/projects/aleja-favorites (original Desktop folder removed after migration)
explore: Scroll through all five chapters, or jump via the top nav
Click any image to open the full-res lightbox — arrow keys or the side buttons page through all 101
Chapter 01 (Building Blocks) shows the raw 3D button/figure components everything else is built from
The Company System chapter is the deepest — full page mockups for the AI workforce and strategy command center
highlights: 101 hand-picked renders across 5 chapters, masonry grid with scroll-reveal
Full-res lightbox with keyboard navigation and neighbor preloading
A living archive: the original folder is gone, this is now the only copy
